desert_dungeon.title: Explore a Desert Pyramid or Dungeon Now Loading desert dungeon

subtitle.text: Every ruin has a reason. The desert has more reasons than most.

description: The Desert civilization fell after mastering death, poison, petrification.
Desert Pyramids hold their loot. Their technology. Their scrolls.
Dungeon Now Loading adds procedural dungeons to desert biomes.
More loot. More context. More of what they left behind.
Death Worm Powder has crafting uses documented in later chapters.
Collect it now. You will understand its purpose later.
The Black Eye — the eye of the Desert civilization —
comes from the Cockatrice, not the Death Worm.
But the worm is a piece of the same picture.
→ Explore a Desert Pyramid or desert dungeon [check]
